serviceIdentity.note: Governance is enforced at the query engine by role under a named service identity. Per-end-user identity passthrough (C8) is a documented target-instance enablement, not claimed here.

policies.name: RAP_REGION
policies.description: Fail-open for base reader/writer/sysadmin; region-scoped roles see only their mapped region via GOV_ROLE_REGION_MAP.

policies.name: MASK_ARR
policies.description: Real ARR for base roles; NULL for region-scoped roles.

parity.query: SELECT region, COUNT(*) AS accounts, ROUND(SUM(revenue_at_risk)) AS rev_at_risk FROM GOLD_CUSTOMER_RENEWAL_RISK GROUP BY region ORDER BY region

cortexGuard.detail: Cortex AI Guardrails (prompt injection/jailbreak detection) is an account-level setting via AI_SETTINGS parameter, not a per-agent object. Cross-region inference prerequisite is met (CORTEX_ENABLED_CROSS_REGION=ANY_REGION), but AI_SETTINGS is currently unset so guardrails are not active. REVENUE_CC_AGENT does not carry its own guardrail config; protection applies globally once the ACCOUNTADMIN enables it.

observability.detail: AI Observability is active on this account. SNOWFLAKE.LOCAL.AI_OBSERVABILITY_EVENTS contains 56,787 events including agent traces (planning, tool execution, response generation). Monitoring pane available in Snowsight under AI & ML > Agents for REVENUE_CC_AGENT.

evaluations.detail: Cortex Agent Evaluations are part of the Agent monitoring experience (evaluation trace summaries in AI_OBSERVABILITY_EVENTS). The feature is available on this account but no evaluation jobs have been configured for REVENUE_CC_AGENT yet.

trace.statement: SELECT COUNT(*) AS reader_total_rows FROM GOLD_CUSTOMER_RENEWAL_RISK;
SELECT ACCOUNT_ID, ANNUAL_RECURRING_REVENUE FROM DIM_ACCOUNT LIMIT 3
SELECT ACCOUNT_ID, ANNUAL_RECURRING_REVENUE FROM DIM_ACCOUNT LIMIT 3;
SELECT region, COUNT(*) AS accounts, ROUND(SUM(revenue_at_risk)) FROM GOLD_CUSTOMER_RENEWAL_RISK GROUP BY region ORDER BY region
